form:Form.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ESTRUCTURA.form

qry:select.name: sql
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG.oi_organigrama, WF.oi_wf, ROLES.c_rol
FROM WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS AS ORG, WRK01_WF AS WF, WRK01_PROCESS AS PRO, WRK01_NODES AS NODES, WRK01_ROLES_NODE AS ROLES, WRK05_ROLES as WF_ROLES
JOIN
ORG.oi_organigrama INNER WF.oi_organigrama, WF.oi_wf INNER PRO.oi_wf, PRO.oi_process INNER NODES.oi_process, NODES.oi_node INNER ROLES.oi_node, ROLES.c_rol INNER WF_ROLES.c_role, ORG.oi_organigrama INNER WF_ROLES.oi_organigrama
where ORG.oi_organigrama = {#SOURCE:@oi_organigrama} and WF_ROLES.oi_role = {#SOURCE:@oi_role} AND WF.l_automatica = 0 GROUP BY ORG.oi_organigrama,WF.oi_wf,ROLES.c_rol
')/ROWS/ROW
